requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (DENAN / Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act + PSE mark, J60335 / JIS C 9335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（DENAN / 电气用品安全法 + PSE标志，J60335 / JIS C 9335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（DENAN / 電氣用品安全法 + PSE標誌，J60335 / JIS C 9335-2-24）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances sold in Japan must comply with DENAN, the Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act (電気用品安全法), administered by METI. Under DENAN, electrical products are classified as 'Specified Electrical Appliances and Materials' (特定電気用品), which require third-party conformity assessment by a METI-Registered Conformity Assessment Body such as JET (Japan Electrical Safety & Environment Technology Laboratories) or JQA and carry the diamond (◇) PSE mark, or 'Non-specified Electrical Appliances and Materials' (特定電気用品以外), which carry the round (◯) PSE mark via the manufacturer's or importer's own conformity confirmation. Household refrigerators are Non-specified, so the round (◯) PSE mark applies. The applicable technical requirements are the DENAN Ministerial Ordinance technical standards — for which compliance can be shown either via the legacy specific technical standards (別表) or via the J60335 series, the Japanese deviation set built on IEC 60335, i.e. J60335-2-24 (H27) read with J60335-1, equivalent to JIS C 9335-2-24 / JIS C 9335-1. Key requirements cover: protection against electric shock; insulation resistance and dielectric strength; thermal cut-outs; creepage and clearance distances; mechanical strength of housing; earthing continuity; and Japanese-language appliance markings. The importer or domestic manufacturer must also file a business notification (事業届出) with METI and maintain inspection records.
summary.zh: 在日本销售的家用制冷器具须符合由METI管理的DENAN《电气用品安全法》（電気用品安全法）。在DENAN下，电气产品分为"特定电气用品"（特定電気用品），须由METI登记的合格评定机构（如JET日本电气安全环境研究所或JQA）进行第三方合格评定并加贴菱形（◇）PSE标志；以及"特定电气用品以外"（即非特定电气用品），通过制造商或进口商自行确认符合性加贴圆形（◯）PSE标志。家用电冰箱属于"非特定"，故适用圆形（◯）PSE标志。适用的技术要求为DENAN省令技术标准——可通过传统的特定技术标准（别表），或通过基于IEC 60335构建并含日本偏差的J60335系列证明符合性，即J60335-2-24（H27）配合J60335-1，等同于JIS C 9335-2-24 / JIS C 9335-1。核心要求涵盖：防触电保护；绝缘电阻与介电强度；热断路器；爬电距离与电气间隙；外壳机械强度；接地连续性；及日文器具标识。进口商或国内制造商还须向METI提交业务申报（事业届出）并保存检查记录。
summary.zht: 在日本銷售的家用製冷器具須符合由METI管理的DENAN《電氣用品安全法》（電気用品安全法）。在DENAN下，電氣產品分為「特定電氣用品」（特定電気用品），須由METI登記的合格評定機構（如JET日本電氣安全環境研究所或JQA）進行第三方合格評定並加貼菱形（◇）PSE標誌；以及「特定電氣用品以外」（即非特定電氣用品），通過製造商或進口商自行確認符合性加貼圓形（◯）PSE標誌。家用電冰箱屬於「非特定」，故適用圓形（◯）PSE標誌。適用的技術要求為DENAN省令技術標準——可通過傳統的特定技術標準（別表），或通過基於IEC 60335構建並含日本偏差的J60335系列證明符合性，即J60335-2-24（H27）配合J60335-1，等同於JIS C 9335-2-24 / JIS C 9335-1。核心要求涵蓋：防觸電保護；絕緣電阻與介電強度；熱斷路器；爬電距離與電氣間隙；外殼機械強度；接地連續性；及日文器具標識。進口商或國內製造商還須向METI提交業務申報（事業届出）並保存檢查記錄。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act (電気用品安全法 / DENAN) — administered by METI; PSE mark scheme
DENAN Ministerial Ordinance Establishing Technical Standards (電気用品の技術上の基準を定める省令) — compliance shown via 別表 specific standards or via the J-standard route
J60335-2-24 (H27) — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (Japanese deviation of IEC 60335-2-24)
J60335-1 (H27) — General requirements (read in conjunction with J60335-2-24)
JIS C 9335-2-24 / JIS C 9335-1 — equivalent JIS safety standards for household and similar electrical appliances

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), which is technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 but incorporates Chinese national deviations. GB 4706.13-2014 is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime. Products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated certification body before sale in China. CCC test reports issued by Chinese laboratories against GB 4706.13 are NOT accepted as equivalent evidence under the Japanese DENAN / PSE conformity-confirmation pathway.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），该标准技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010，但包含中国国家偏差。GB 4706.13-2014为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度监督执行。产品须经CNCA指定认证机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。中国实验室依据GB 4706.13出具的CCC检测报告不被日本DENAN / PSE符合性确认路径接受为等效证据。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），該標準技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010，但包含中國國家偏差。GB 4706.13-2014為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度監督執行。產品須經CNCA指定認證機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。中國實驗室依據GB 4706.13出具的CCC檢測報告不被日本DENAN / PSE符合性確認路徑接受為等效證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Both GB 4706.13-2014 and J60335-2-24 / JIS C 9335-2-24 descend from IEC 60335-2-24, so the core safety engineering is broadly aligned, but Japan-specific gaps remain: (1) PSE conformity confirmation — the importer or domestic manufacturer must affix the round (◯) PSE mark based on conformity to the DENAN technical standard, file the business notification (事業届出) with METI, and retain inspection records for the statutory period; Chinese CCC certification does not discharge any of these obligations. (2) Grid conditions — Japanese mains is 100 V / 200 V at 50 Hz (east) or 60 Hz (west), versus China's 220 V / 380 V at 50 Hz; appliances must be verified for the lower voltage and dual-frequency operation, including motor/compressor rating and protective-device coordination. (3) National deviations and plug type — J60335 carries Japanese deviations and Japan uses the JIS C 8303 / Type A plug and earthing conventions, so Chinese CCC test data cannot be assumed to cover the Japanese test requirements without engineering review. (4) Japanese-language markings and instructions are required.
gap.zh: GB 4706.13-2014与J60335-2-24 / JIS C 9335-2-24均源自IEC 60335-2-24，核心安全工程大体一致，但仍存在日本特有差距：（1）PSE符合性确认——进口商或国内制造商须依据符合DENAN技术标准加贴圆形（◯）PSE标志，向METI提交业务申报（事业届出），并按法定期限保存检查记录；中国CCC认证不能免除上述任一义务。（2）电网条件——日本市电为100 V / 200 V，东部50 Hz、西部60 Hz，而中国为220 V / 380 V、50 Hz；器具须针对较低电压和双频运行进行验证，包括电机/压缩机额定值及保护装置配合。（3）国家偏差与插头型式——J60335含日本偏差，日本采用JIS C 8303 / A型插头及接地惯例，故中国CCC检测数据不能在未经工程评审的情况下默认涵盖日本试验要求。（4）须提供日文标识和使用说明书。
gap.zht: GB 4706.13-2014與J60335-2-24 / JIS C 9335-2-24均源自IEC 60335-2-24，核心安全工程大體一致，但仍存在日本特有差距：（1）PSE符合性確認——進口商或國內製造商須依據符合DENAN技術標準加貼圓形（◯）PSE標誌，向METI提交業務申報（事業届出），並按法定期限保存檢查記錄；中國CCC認證不能免除上述任一義務。（2）電網條件——日本市電為100 V / 200 V，東部50 Hz、西部60 Hz，而中國為220 V / 380 V、50 Hz；器具須針對較低電壓和雙頻運行進行驗證，包括電機/壓縮機額定值及保護裝置配合。（3）國家偏差與插頭型式——J60335含日本偏差，日本採用JIS C 8303 / A型插頭及接地慣例，故中國CCC檢測數據不能在未經工程評審的情況下默認涵蓋日本試驗要求。（4）須提供日文標識和使用說明書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — PSE mark under DENAN required before sale in Japan; refrigerators are Non-specified appliances (round ◯ PSE via conformity confirmation to the DENAN technical standard / J60335-2-24); business notification (事業届出) to METI required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: METI (Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry) — DENAN / Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act portal

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The PSE mark under DENAN is mandatory for household refrigerating appliances sold in Japan. Refrigerators are Non-specified appliances, so the round (◯) PSE mark applies via conformity confirmation to the DENAN technical standard (J60335-2-24 / JIS C 9335-2-24). Chinese CCC certification to GB 4706.13 does not satisfy DENAN; testing to the Japanese standard, the METI business notification (事業届出), 100/200 V dual-frequency verification, and Japanese-language markings are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] DENAN下的PSE标志是在日本销售家用制冷器具的强制要求。电冰箱属于非特定电气用品，故通过符合DENAN技术标准（J60335-2-24 / JIS C 9335-2-24）确认符合性加贴圆形（◯）PSE标志。中国依据GB 4706.13取得的CCC认证不满足DENAN；须按日本标准检测、向METI提交业务申报（事业届出）、进行100/200 V双频验证并提供日文标识。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] DENAN下的PSE標誌是在日本銷售家用製冷器具的強制要求。電冰箱屬於非特定電氣用品，故通過符合DENAN技術標準（J60335-2-24 / JIS C 9335-2-24）確認符合性加貼圓形（◯）PSE標誌。中國依據GB 4706.13取得的CCC認證不滿足DENAN；須按日本標準檢測、向METI提交業務申報（事業届出）、進行100/200 V雙頻驗證並提供日文標識。
